headline: Xi replies to Young Pioneers; Doubao to monetize; NVIDIA partners with Unitree on humanoid robot; China enters flood season
narrative:
President Xi Jinping's letter to Young Pioneer docents at two revolutionary memorials ahead of Children's Day underscores the regime's continued emphasis on ideological education for youth. This reinforces the narrative of historical mission and patriotic indoctrination among the next generation. Separately, Doubao, the AI assistant by ByteDance, is expected to begin charging users in late June, marking a significant step toward monetization of AI products in China. The move will be accompanied by product updates at the Force conference.

In tech news, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang announced a partnership with Chinese robotics firm Unitree to develop a 1.8-meter humanoid robot reference design, H2+, aimed at accelerating innovation in the global humanoid robotics sector. Meanwhile, China has officially entered the flood season, with authorities urging public safety measures as southern regions brace for heavy rainfall. A viral photo of a 'mud man' official who survived a mudslide while evacuating residents has drawn attention to disaster response efforts.

Other trending stories include a flight delay complaint during taxiing in Guangzhou, a young teacher who turned a bottom-ranked class into top performers, and ByteDance's Doubao charging news (repeated). These stories reflect public concerns over service quality, education, and internet business models.
narrative_zh:
习近平主席在儿童节前夕给中共一大纪念馆和南湖革命纪念馆的少先队红领巾讲解员回信，强调对青少年的意识形态教育，延续历史使命和爱国主义宣传。字节跳动旗下AI助手豆包预计6月下旬正式收费，标志着中国AI产品商业化的重要一步，同时将在Force大会上更新功能。

英伟达CEO黄仁勋宣布与宇树科技合作开发1.8米人形机器人参考设计H2+，旨在加速全球人形机器人创新。我国6月1日全面进入汛期，南方进入主汛期，水利部提醒公众注意安全。一位在疏散群众时被泥石流冲走又奇迹生还的“泥人干部”田如良引发网络关注。

其他热点包括广州白云机场一航班落地滑行58分钟引旅客不满、00后班主任将垫底班带到年级第一的事迹，以及豆包即将收费的重复信息。这些故事反映了公众对服务质量、教育和互联网商业模式的关注。
